🔍 Findings

✅ Portal Renders Cleanly — No PWA Modal

PWA modal removed. Portal loads directly with net4sats branding, data options, and payment tabs. Size selector visible.

✅ Payment Instant (poll 1)

Lightning payment via testnut.cashu.exchange completes in ~3 seconds. Internet access confirmed with example.com.

✅ Admin Panel Renders

Login page at http://192.168.1.1/ shows net4sats ROUTER ADMIN branding with login form.

⚠️ Size Selector Still Outside Card

AI vision reports the data buttons (100 MB, 1 GB, 10 GB, More) are above the white card, not inside it. The code change to move them inside may not have deployed correctly, or the layout needs further CSS adjustment.

⚠️ Invoice State Not Clear

The processing/invoice screenshots show the same pricing screen. The portal JS may not be transitioning to the QR/processing state visually, though the API call succeeds.

⚠️ No Splash Redirect Anymore

Removed the JS redirect (was causing loop). NDS URL bar shows IP — accepted as standard behavior (issue #19).
